coreMeaning.en: stake put up before a game; to pay in advance

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante = 赌局前付的钱 → 预付款
ante- = 先于、在前 → 构词前缀

coreMeaning.cn: 战前的（尤指美国内战前）
coreMeaning.en: existing before a war, especially the American Civil War

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + bellum(战争) = 战前的
ante(前) + mort(死) = 死前的
ante(前) + partum(分娩) = 产前的

coreMeaning.en: a small room leading to a main room; waiting room

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + room(房间) = 前厅候客室

coreMeaning.en: a mammal that feeds on ants and termites

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ant(蚂蚁) + eater(吃者) = 食蚁兽
anteater(食蚁兽) + s = 复数

coreMeaning.en: to precede; to be earlier than; to surpass

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + cede(走) = 走在前面 → 先于

coreMeaning.en: the condition of going before; precedence

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + ced(走) + ence(状态) = 先行状态

coreMeaning.cn: 先行的；先前的；祖先；（语法）先行词
coreMeaning.en: preceding; a thing or person that precedes; an ancestor

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + ced(走) + ent = 走在前面的 → 先行词/祖先

coreMeaning.en: plural of antecedent; ancestors; past history

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antecedent(先行的) + s = 祖先们；过往经历
ante(前) + cess(走) + or(者) = 走在前面的人 → 前任

coreMeaning.en: a small room leading to a main room; anteroom

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + chamber(厅) = 前厅候客室
antechamber(前厅) + s = 复数

coreMeaning.en: anterior; situated before or in front

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + corious = 前面的，居前的

coreMeaning.en: a forecourt; a court in front of a building

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + court(庭院) = 前庭

coreMeaning.cn: 先于……发生；填早于实际的日期
coreMeaning.en: to precede in time; to assign an earlier date than the actual one

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + date(日期) = 填早于实际的日期；早于

coreMeaning.cn: 先于……发生（过去式）；填早于实际的日期
coreMeaning.en: past tense of antedate; preceded in time

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antedate(先于) + d = 过去式：曾先于

coreMeaning.cn: 先于……发生（第三人称单数）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antedate + s = 第三人称单数形式
antedate + ing = 现在分词：正在先于

coreMeaning.cn: 大洪水前的；远古的；陈旧的
coreMeaning.en: of the period before the biblical flood; extremely old-fashioned

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'ante diluvium', 'lang': 'Latin', 'meaning': 'before the flood'}, {'form': 'antediluvian', 'lang': 'English', 'meaning': 'of or relating to the period before the Flood; very old'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + diluvian(洪水的) = 洪水之前的 → 远古的；陈旧的

coreMeaning.cn: 付账；支付预付款（ante的现在分词）
coreMeaning.en: paying one's share; putting up a stake

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(赌注) + ing = 正在付赌注；支付分担额

coreMeaning.en: a swift-running hoofed mammal with horns

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antelope → 听起来像"奔跑的花鹿" → 羚羊
antelope(羚羊) + s = 羚羊群

coreMeaning.en: of or occurring in the morning; before noon

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + meridian(正午) = 正午前 → 上午的

coreMeaning.en: before noon; in the morning (abbreviated A.M.)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + meridiem(正午) = A.M. 上午

coreMeaning.cn: 世界形成前的；创世前的
coreMeaning.en: existing or occurring before the creation of the world

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'ante mundus', 'lang': 'Latin', 'meaning': 'before the world'}, {'form': 'antemundane', 'lang': 'English', 'meaning': 'before the creation of the world'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + mund(世界) + ane = 创世前的

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'ante + natus', 'lang': 'Latin', 'meaning': 'before birth'}, {'form': 'antenatal', 'lang': 'English', 'meaning': 'of or occurring before birth'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + natal(出生) = 出生前的 → 产前检查

coreMeaning.en: a rod for receiving or sending radio/TV signals; a feeler on an insect's head

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'antenna', 'lang': 'Latin', 'meaning': 'sailyard, yardarm (extended to insect feeler)'}, {'form': 'antenna', 'lang': 'English', 'meaning': 'feeler; radio receiver rod'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antenna = 天线 / 昆虫触角，接收信号的感应器
antenna(触角) → antennae = 拉丁语复数形式

coreMeaning.en: of or relating to an antenna or antennae

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antenna(触角) + al = 触角的，天线的

coreMeaning.en: plural of antenna (especially for radio/TV devices)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antenna(天线) + s = 多根天线

coreMeaning.en: occurring or done before marriage; prenuptial

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + nuptial(婚礼) = 婚前的

coreMeaning.en: the third syllable from the end of a word

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + penult(倒数第二) = 倒数第三音节

coreMeaning.cn: 倒数第三的；倒数第三位
coreMeaning.en: last but two; the third from last

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + penultimate(倒数第二的) = 倒数第三的

coreMeaning.cn: 前面的；先前的；（解剖）前部的
coreMeaning.en: nearer the front; earlier in time; situated in front

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: anterior = 比较级"更前面的" → 前面的，先前的

coreMeaning.en: a small room leading to a larger main room

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(前) + room(房间) = 前厅候客室
anteroom(前厅) + s = 多个前厅

coreMeaning.cn: 赌注（复数）；付款（第三人称单数）
coreMeaning.en: plural of ante; third person singular of ante

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ante(赌注) + s = 赌注们；各自的赌注

coreMeaning.cn: 安西娅（女子名）；花之女神

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Anthea = anth(花) + ea = 花之女神，女子名

coreMeaning.en: a song of praise or patriotism; a national or official song

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'antiphon', 'lang': 'Greek', 'meaning': 'a responsive song (anti- + phone)'}, {'form': 'antefn', 'lang': 'Old English', 'meaning': 'antiphon'}, {'form': 'anthem', 'lang': 'English', 'meaning': 'song of praise, national song'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: anthem = 赞美诗 → 国歌（最庄严的赞美诗）

coreMeaning.cn: 赞美诗式的；激昂感人的（像国歌一样）
coreMeaning.en: resembling or suitable for an anthem; stirringly uplifting

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: anthem(赞美诗) + ic = 赞美诗式的，激昂感人的
anthem(赞美诗) + s = 多首赞美诗

coreMeaning.en: the part of a flower's stamen that contains and releases pollen

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: anther = ant + her → 蚂蚁她的 → 花药（存储花粉的囊）
anther(花药) + s = 多个花药

coreMeaning.cn: 蚁丘；蚂蚁巢穴的小土堆
coreMeaning.en: a mound of earth made by ants as a nest

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ant(蚂蚁) + hill(丘) = 蚁丘
anthill(蚁丘) + s = 多个蚁丘

coreMeaning.en: plural of anthology; collections of selected literary works

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'anthologia', 'lang': 'Greek', 'meaning': 'a gathering of flowers (metaphor for collected poems)'}, {'form': 'anthology + -ies', 'lang': 'English', 'meaning': 'plural form'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antho(花) + logy(学) + ies = 采花集 → 文集、选集

coreMeaning.en: a person who compiles an anthology

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: antho(花) + log(收集) + ist(者) = 采花集编者 → 文集编辑
